title: [TACZ] Gucci & Vuitton Attachments
description: A gunpack for "Timeless and Classic Guns: Zero" with huge amount of attachments.
body:
# Gucci & Vuitton Attachments
## Description

An extension with huge amounts of well-made attachments for the mod Timeless and Classic Guns: Zero The predecessor of this project is the "Gucci" Attachments by Koei, we've added much more new attachments to it and packaged it as a mod.

![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/gv_1.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/gv_1.png)  
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/7l3hy.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/7l3hy.png)  
![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/7l3ru.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/7l3ru.png)  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/glctkodF2J4?si=Z1BcKv5Xppxi1pEN" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/dependency_1.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/dependency_1.png)  
## Dependency
This is a MOD, Please put the .jar file in the mods folder but not in tacz gun pack path.
**You need tacz 1.1.4 or above to run this mod**

![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/updates_1.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/updates_1.png)
## Updates

We've packaged the original gunpack into a mod version in preparation for more cool features in the future! This update adds nearly 30 different attchments, containing 10 grips, 14 muzzles, 1 sight, and 9 stocks

![https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/cont_1.png](https://q1.boheurl.com/lesraisins/i/2024/09/16/cont_1.png)  
## Contributors

**Developers:** xjqsh  

**Data Designer:** Midori_Poi  

**Artists： ** LeComte, Rhodes_koei
